Description.Name: I've Had Enough...
Description.Details: The Argo's steady hum is broken only by the clipped tone of an incoming channel as you review reports in the command deck. "Commander," comes the voice of Darius Oliveira, your XO, edged with something between concern and resignation, "you might want to get over to Docking Collar 2. [[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] is there—bags packed. Shuttle's inbound from the surface of {TGT_SYSTEM.name}."You pause, then rise without a word. Minutes later, you arrive. Docking Collar 2 is colder than the rest of the ship, all exposed plating and harsh lighting. The outer hatch stands sealed for now, but the indicator shows an incoming craft minutes out. [[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] stands beside a small stack of gear—everything {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:own|Default:owns} aboard the Argo, reduced to a few bags. {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:don't|Default:doesn't} turn when you approach. "Figured you'd hear about it." "I did," you reply evenly. {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:glance|Default:glances} over their shoulder. "Then you know why I'm here. No drops. No future. I'm done waiting." Behind you, Darius remains silent, watching.

Description.Name: Try to convince {TGT_MW.Callsign} to stay
Description.Details: You step closer, lowering your voice. "Walking out now won't fix that. You think every other command is going to hand you frontline drops just because you're impatient? You've got a place here. You've trained with this crew, earned your spot. I can change your deployment status—but not if you're halfway out the airlock." {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:turn|Default:turns} to face you fully now, searching your expression. "You've said things like that before." "And I'm saying it differently now," you answer. "Next contract, you're on the roster. Not a promise to keep you quiet—a decision. Stay, and prove you belong out there." {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:hold|Default:holds} your gaze for a long moment… then {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:shake|Default:shakes} {TGT_MW.Det} head. "No," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:say|Default:says} quietly. "I don't believe you." The shuttle proximity alarm ticks down as {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:look|Default:looks} past you, resolve settling in. "I've heard 'soon' before. I'm not hearing it again."

Description.Name: Fire {TGT_MW.Callsign}
Description.Details: You stop a few paces away, arms behind your back. "If you're done, then be done. I don't hold people here who don't want to be here." [[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] turns, something sharp in {TGT_MW.Det} expression. "That's it? No argument?" {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:say|Default:says}. "You've made up your mind," you reply coldly. "And I won't waste time chasing someone who's already walking away." A bitter smirk crosses {TGT_MW.Det} face. "At least you're consistent," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:say|Default:says}. "The shuttle's waiting," you say. {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:grab|Default:grabs} {TGT_MW.Det} bags without another word. As the docking clamps engage and the outer hatch begins its cycle, {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:pause|Default:pauses} just long enough to glance back. "Hope your next pilot likes simulators," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:say|Default:says}. Darius watches {TGT_MW.Obj} go, then looks to you. "We'll feel that loss." "Then we adapt," you answer, as the hatch seals and the Argo returns to its steady, indifferent hum.
